resources.string: Unlocks Android Auto keyboard (gearhead + Google Maps scope) by spoofing stopped/parked vehicle state.
Spoofs stopped/parked vehicle state in Android Auto
Verbose logging: ON (logging build — MAPS-DRIVE traces enabled)
Verbose logging: OFF (release build — install the -log APK for traces)
Enable this module for Android Auto and Google Maps (all processes, including :car) in LSPosed Manager.
